title: Dashi-Steamed Mussels with Egyptian Spices
description: This dish brings together the brininess of mussels, the warmth of Egyptian spices, and the savory flavor of dashi in a simple yet satisfying meal. Chewy bread is perfect for sopping up the flavorful broth.
instructions: Rinse the mussels under cold water and remove any beards.
In a large saucepan, combine the dashi broth, Egyptian spices, salt, and tagine oil (if using).
Bring the broth to a simmer over medium-high heat.
Add the mussels to the saucepan, cover, and steam for 3-5 minutes, or until the mussels open.
Serve the mussels in bowls with lemon wedges and chewy bread on the side (if using).
Pour the flavorful broth over the mussels and enjoy.
